svg.text: Docker Core Concepts — The Big Picture
How everything connects: from writing code to running containers

g.text: The cooked dish — your app running live
Pull official images or push your own
Doorbell wiring — connects outside to inside
Full meal plan — orchestrates multiple containers with one command: docker compose up
USB drive — data persists even if container dies
Bind mount: ./src:/app/src (for dev — live code editing)
Private LAN — containers talk by service name
backend connects to db using hostname "db" (not an IP!)
docker build → creates an Image (with layers + tag)
docker run → starts a Container (with ports, volumes, network)
